Minimal Vyasa Sample

This sample demonstrates the basic formatting capabilities of the Vyasa language. It uses semantic formatting commands that are rendered to HTML.

Formatting Demo

You can apply emphasis levels:
  • Level 1 (e1): Strong importance
  • Level 2 (e2): Stressed emphasis (italics)

Breaks and Flow

Text flows naturally.

a new line.
